name: Solidus Milestone M3 - Webhooks and Async Processing
description: Implement Stripe webhook ingestion, persist-first async processing, and event handler parity.

userStories.title: Build Express webhook adapter
userStories.description: As an integrator, I want a safe Express webhook adapter so Stripe events are verified and ingested correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement webhook router factory and route-local raw body middleware
Verify signatures with support for multiple webhook secrets
Add startup and runtime diagnostics for webhook misconfiguration
Pass tests for valid and invalid signatures, missing headers, wrong secret, and parsed-body failure

userStories.title: Implement persist-first webhook pipeline and queue adapters
userStories.description: As an operations engineer, I want durable webhook persistence and retries so transient failures do not lose events.
acceptanceCriteria: Persist incoming webhook events with idempotency keys
Implement inline and db-outbox processing adapters
Pass tests for duplicate events, transient handler errors, and retry-backoff behavior
Publish operational runbook for stuck or retrying webhooks

userStories.title: Implement Stripe event handler parity
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want parity with mapped Pay webhook events so projections and lifecycle behavior stay complete.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement handlers for all events listed in pay-gem-research/stripe-webhook-map.md
Implement custom subscriber API for subscribe, unsubscribe, and all
Prevent duplicate notifications or side effects where Pay suppresses them
Pass event-by-event integration tests using fixture payloads
Publish coverage matrix proving all mapped events are implemented
